title: geum calthifolium var. congestum
intro: Geum calthifolium var. congestum, also known as the Spotted Avens or Congested Avens, is a rare and variable plant species within the Geum genus. This perennial plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Geum calthifolium var. congestum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional folk medicine to address various health concerns.
